title: elaeocarpus decipiens var. changii
intro: Elaeocarpus decipiens var. changii, also known as Chang's blue berry tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus decipiens var. changii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide antioxidant protection against free radicals. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
